rationale: Derivatives positioning data for STX (funding rates, open interest) is not freely accessible without a paid Coinglass API key or exchange API subscription; correlation coefficients require raw OHLCV data and computation not served pre-calculated on any listed free tier.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/currencies/STX — Coinglass STX page exists but funding rate & OI data behind API paywall / login for export; spot-check UI values are not machine-readable on free tier.

https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/blockstack — CoinGecko provides price/volume/market cap for STX but does NOT publish pre-computed correlation coefficients or derivatives metrics on free public pages.
https://defillama.com/protocol/stacks — DefiLlama covers Stacks TVL but has no derivatives or correlation data.

https://fred.stlouisfed.org — FRED provides NASDAQ index data (e.g. NASDAQCOM series) but correlation to STX requires manual computation against CoinGecko price series; not pre-calculated anywhere on free tier.
